about.hero1: EmpathAI is a safe space to process grief and emotional pain.
about.hero2: Built on responsible AI and backed by expert-led research.
about.aboutP1: EmpathAI is a research-driven wellbeing platform designed to support individuals through grief, emotional distress, and mental health challenges using responsible AI, peer support, and reflective tools.
about.aboutP2: Built under the guidance of Professor Elvira Pérez Vallejos, a global leader in digital mental health and AI ethics at the University of Nottingham, EmpathAI bridges cutting-edge technology with compassionate care. Professor Pérez Vallejos brings decades of interdisciplinary expertise in AI ethics, mental health, and co-produced research—ensuring that EmpathAI is built with users' dignity, privacy, and emotional wellbeing at its core.
about.feature1Desc: Our AI-powered chatbot provides gentle, grounded support during difficult times like bereavement, anxiety, or emotional overwhelm. It responds with empathy, never judgement.
about.feature2Desc: Write about your thoughts, memories, and emotions in a safe, private space. Journaling can be a powerful tool for grief processing and emotional clarity.
about.feature3Desc: Track habits and emotional patterns to better understand your wellbeing over time. Gentle prompts help you stay aware and in tune with your daily rhythm.
about.feature4Title: Writing Letters to your loved ones
about.feature4Desc: Express love, longing, or unresolved feelings through guided letter-writing rituals. A deeply healing way to reconnect and release.
about.feature5Desc: Ground yourself with short meditations designed for grief, calm, or emotional overwhelm. Learn to pause, breathe, and gently come back to the present.
about.feature6Desc: A gentle guide to planting a memorial tree or sapling in honor of a loved one. Create a living tribute and ritual that nurtures remembrance and growth.
about.feature7Desc: Small, science-backed suggestions to support mental and emotional health—whether you're just surviving the day or looking to rebuild slowly.
about.researchP1: EmpathAI is a project led by Professor Elvira Pérez Vallejos, Professor of Mental Health and Digital Technology — jointly appointed by the School of Computer Science and the School of Medicine at the University of Nottingham.
about.researchP2: Professor Pérez Vallejos is internationally recognised for her work on AI Ethics, and was recently named among the 100 Brilliant Women in AI Ethics (2025). She leads over £100M in interdisciplinary research, supported by UKRI, NIHR, and other major research bodies. Her work ensures EmpathAI reflects the highest standards in privacy, ethical AI, co-production, and digital mental health innovation.
about.privacyIntro: Your data is treated with the highest standards of care and security.
about.privacyItem1: All messages sent to the chatbot and between users are stored in encrypted form.
about.privacyItem2: Data is securely stored on servers within the University of Nottingham.
about.privacyItem3: We do not sell, share, or monetise your personal data. Ever.
about.whyP1: EmpathAI is more than just a tech tool—it's a compassionate companion during life's most vulnerable moments. Guided by leading experts in Responsible AI, our mission is to deliver emotionally intelligent support that is safe, inclusive, and grounded in real-world ethics.
about.whyP2: EmpathAI is part of a broader vision to ethically integrate AI into sensitive domains like grief support, end-of-life care, and mental health—ensuring that innovation never comes at the expense of humanity.
about.whyQuote: 🕊️ Empathy is not a feature. It's our foundation.
